# ar.io - Permanent Cloud Storage

> ar.io provides permanent, decentralized cloud storage built on Arweave.

## About
ar.io is the access layer for the permaweb, providing gateways, naming (ArNS),
and tools for permanent data storage and retrieval.

## Key Products
- Gateways: Fast, resilient access to permanent data
- ArNS: Permanent naming system for apps and data
- Turbo: Upload service for permanent storage

## Documentation
- Docs: https://docs.ar.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/ar-io
- Brand Kit (Human): https://ar.io/brand-kit
- Brand Kit (Machine): https://ar.io/brand-kit/agents.json

## Contact
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/ar_io_network
